rewind.confirmMessage: 回退到此處？此訊息之後的檔案變更將被還原。回退不會影響手動或透過 bash 編輯的檔案。
rewind.notice: 已回退：還原了 {count} 個檔案
rewind.noticeSaveFailed: 已回退：還原了 {count} 個檔案，但無法儲存狀態：{error}
rewind.unavailableNoUuid: 無法回退：缺少訊息識別碼

fork.maxTabsReached: 無法分叉：已達到最大 {count} 個分頁
fork.unavailableNoUuid: 無法分叉：缺少訊息識別碼
fork.unavailableNoResponse: 無法分叉：沒有可分叉的回應
fork.errorNoSession: 沒有可用的工作階段 ID
fork.commandNoMessages: 無法分叉：對話中沒有訊息
fork.commandNoAssistantUuid: 無法分叉：沒有帶識別碼的助手回覆

userName.name: Codexian 應該如何稱呼您？
userName.desc: 用於個人化問候的使用者名稱（留空使用通用問候）

excludedTags.name: 排除的標籤
excludedTags.desc: 包含這些標籤的筆記不會自動載入為上下文（每行一個，不帶 #）

mediaFolder.name: 媒體資料夾
mediaFolder.desc: Folder containing attachments/images. When notes use ![[image.jpg]], Codex will look here. Leave empty for vault root.

systemPrompt.name: 自訂系統提示詞
systemPrompt.desc: 附加到預設系統提示詞的額外指令

autoTitle.name: 自動生成對話標題
autoTitle.desc: 在使用者送出第一則訊息後自動生成對話標題。

titleModel.name: 標題生成模型
titleModel.desc: 用於自動生成對話標題的模型。

navMappings.name: Vim 風格導航映射
navMappings.desc: 每行一個映射。格式："map <鍵> <動作>"（動作：scrollUp, scrollDown, focusInput）。

slashCommands.name: Commands and Skills
slashCommands.desc: Manage vault-level Codex skills stored in .codex/skills/ and .agents/skills/. Triggered by $name.

hiddenSlashCommands.name: Hidden Commands and Skills
hiddenSlashCommands.desc: Hide specific commands and skills from the dropdown. Enter names without the leading slash or dollar sign, one per line.

mcpServers.name: MCP Servers
mcpServers.desc: Codex MCP servers are configured by the Codex CLI. Use codex mcp to manage them.

plugins.name: Codex Plugins
plugins.desc: Codexian is Codex-only and does not manage third-party provider plugins.

subagents.name: 子代理
subagents.desc: 管理保管庫層級的 Codex 子代理，檔案存放在 .codex/agents/。每個 TOML 檔案定義一個自訂代理。
subagents.noAgents: 尚未設定子代理。點擊 + 建立一個。
subagents.renameCleanupFailed: 警告：無法移除「{name}」的舊檔案

modal.name: 名稱
modal.nameDesc: 僅限小寫字母、數字與連字號
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: 檢查程式碼中的錯誤與風格問題
modal.toolsDesc: 允許工具的逗號分隔清單（留空 = 全部）
modal.disallowedToolsDesc: 要禁用的工具清單，以逗號分隔
modal.promptPlaceholder: 你是一名程式碼審查員。請分析給定的程式碼...

loadUserSettings.name: Load user Codex settings
loadUserSettings.desc: Codex reads its own CLI configuration. Codexian keeps provider settings under this vault.

codexSafeMode.name: Safe mode
codexSafeMode.desc: Sandbox mode used when the Safe toggle is active.

customVariables.name: 自訂變數
customVariables.desc: Environment variables for the active provider (KEY=VALUE format, one per line). Shell export prefix supported.

envSnippets.name: 片段
envSnippets.noSnippets: 尚無保存的環境變數片段。點擊 + 保存當前配置。

modal.name: 名稱
modal.envVarsPlaceholder: KEY=VALUE 格式，每行一個（支援 export 前綴）

customContextLimits.name: 自訂上下文限制
customContextLimits.desc: 為您的自訂模型設定上下文視窗大小。留空使用預設值（200k 權杖）。

customModels.name: Custom models
customModels.desc: Append additional Codex model IDs to the picker, one per line. Environment model overrides still replace the picker.

enableChrome.name: Browser integration
enableChrome.desc: Browser integration is provider-specific. Codexian does not manage a separate Chrome extension here.

enableBangBash.name: 啟用 bash 模式 (!)
enableBangBash.desc: 在空白輸入框中輸入 ! 以進入 bash 模式。透過 Node.js child_process 直接執行指令。需要重新開啟檢視。

validation.noNode: 在 PATH 中找不到 Node.js。請安裝 Node.js 或檢查 PATH 設定。

maxTabs.name: 最大聊天標籤數
maxTabs.desc: Maximum number of chat tabs open simultaneously (3-10). Each tab uses a separate Codex session.
maxTabs.warning: 超過 5 個標籤可能會影響效能和記憶體使用。

tabBarPosition.name: 標籤列位置
tabBarPosition.desc: 選擇標籤徽章和操作按鈕的顯示位置

enableAutoScroll.name: 串流傳輸時自動捲動
enableAutoScroll.desc: Automatically scroll down while Codex streams responses. Disable to stay at the top and read from the beginning.

deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.name: 串流傳輸時延遲渲染數學公式
deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.desc: 回應串流傳輸時顯示原始 LaTeX，並在每個文字區塊完成後只渲染一次數學公式。

chatViewPlacement.name: Codexian 開啟位置
chatViewPlacement.desc: 選擇新建聊天面板時的開啟位置

cliPath.name: Codex CLI path
cliPath.desc: Custom path to Codex CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection.
cliPath.descWindows: For native Windows, use codex.exe. For WSL, use a Linux command or Linux absolute path inside the selected distro.
cliPath.descUnix: Paste the output of "which codex", or leave empty for PATH lookup.

language.name: 語言
language.desc: 更改插件介面的顯示語言

initialize.name: Initialize knowledge-base workflow
initialize.desc: Create missing new/raw/wiki/outputs folders, AGENTS.md, indexes, workflow map, and Codex skills without overwriting existing files.

batchSize.name: Maximum sources per batch
batchSize.desc: Maximum number of files from new/ to process when compiling new sources.

summaryTemplate.name: Summary template
summaryTemplate.desc: Default structure for wiki/summaries/S-xxx files created from new/ sources.

conceptTemplate.name: Concept template
conceptTemplate.desc: Default structure for new wiki/concepts/C-xxx files.

archiveRules.name: Archive classification rules
archiveRules.desc: Controls how compiled new/ sources are renamed and archived into raw/.

archiveLogTemplate.name: Archive log template
archiveLogTemplate.desc: Log structure used when recording new/ to raw/ archive moves.

knowledgeWorkflow.notReady: Codexian is not ready yet. Open the chat panel and try again.

initialized.ready: Codexian knowledge-base workflow is ready. No new files were needed.
initialized.created: Codexian knowledge-base workflow initialized: created {folders} folder(s) and {files} file(s).
initialized.failed: Failed to initialize Codexian knowledge-base workflow: {message}

compileNewSources.name: Compile new sources
compileNewSources.description: Compile new sources from the vault root new/ folder

saveCurrentQa.name: Save current Q&A
saveCurrentQa.description: Save reusable conclusions from the current conversation to outputs/qa

applyHealthFixes.name: Apply health-check suggestions
applyHealthFixes.description: Apply low-risk fixes from the latest health-check report

undoLastArchive.name: Undo last archive
undoLastArchive.description: Build and run an undo plan from the latest archive log

workflowAcceptance.name: Run knowledge-base workflow acceptance check
workflowAcceptance.description: Run an end-to-end acceptance check for the current vault knowledge workflow
workflowAcceptance.notice: Sent: run knowledge-base workflow acceptance check
